databaseItemFiltered: The item is filtered. Remove the filter or grouping settings to view it.
newItemTemplateUnavailableNotebookTip: The notebook previously selected for this template is closed or unavailable. Please select a save location again
databaseAttrViewModeTip: Set whether database attributes are expanded when opening a document
onboardingDescription: Your first notebook is ready. Write down what's on your mind!
agentEditHistoryWarning: Later messages include executed tool calls. Resending will delete the later conversation, but it will not undo operations that have already run. Continue?
boxDocEnabledTip: When enabled, the notebook itself can also be used to record content
obsidianUnreadableFiles: Unreadable files: ${count}; these unreferenced files could not be read and will not be imported
importFromMoreApps: Import from other formats or apps
obsidianMissingTargets: Missing targets: ${count}; the file or block referenced by a link or embed was not found, so the original text will be preserved
obsidianAmbiguousTargets: Ambiguous targets: ${count}; multiple targets matched, so the first match will be used
obsidianUnsupportedTargets: Unsupported targets: ${count}; the target type or syntax cannot be converted reliably, so the original text will be preserved
obsidianCompatibilityTip: Obsidian uses some non-standard private Markdown syntax. We have invested dedicated development effort in adapting it and can now handle most common cases; content that cannot be converted reliably will be preserved as-is
obsidianSkippedSummary: Skipped paths: ${count}; hidden files, symbolic links, special files, and nested Vaults will not be imported
obsidianUnreferencedTip: ${count} unreferenced files will be imported as unreferenced assets
docIconClickExpand: Click document icon to expand or collapse child documents
docIconClickExpandTip: When enabled, clicking a document icon expands or collapses child documents, and opens the document when there are no child documents; when disabled, clicking a document icon changes the icon
parentDocClickExpand: Click parent document title to expand or collapse child documents
parentDocClickExpandTip: When enabled, clicking a parent document title expands or collapses child documents, and the parent document can be opened using Open document in the context menu; when there are no child documents, clicking still opens the document directly
mcpDisconnectAuthorizationConfirm: Disconnect OAuth authorization for this remote service?
aiImageUnderstandingTip: Analyzes images. Select a model that supports image input
aiImageGenerationTip: Generates images. Select a model that supports image output
agentEffectDataEgress: Document or image data will be sent to the configured API provider
agentStreamIdleTimeoutTip: Maximum time without model output before the request is stopped
aiMcpTrustToolAnnotationsTip: Allow this server's read-only tool annotations to skip operation confirmation. Enable only for trusted servers.
rerankTip: After semantic search recall, use a rerank model to re-score candidates for more precise results
apiEndpointRerankTip: The full URL of the rerank endpoint. Fill it in according to the target model's documentation, as the endpoint path varies across providers
rerankCandidateCountTip: Number of candidate documents sent to the rerank model after vector recall. Larger values improve accuracy but increase latency
encryptedExportRiskTip: Exporting encrypted notebook content creates unencrypted files that can be read by anyone with access to them. Continue?
weakPasswordConfirmTip: This password is weak and may be vulnerable to brute-force attacks. Do you want to use it anyway?
encryptedNotebookAutoLockDesc: Automatically lock encrypted notebooks after specified idle minutes, viewing, editing, or searching encrypted content resets the timer, set to 0 to disable auto-lock
exportNotebookCryptoBackupTip: Key backup exported, please keep it somewhere safe
importNotebookCryptoBackupTip: Key backup imported, please use the master password corresponding to this key to unlock from now on
desktopModeRestartTip: The app will close automatically after the change, please restart it manually
encryptedNotebookTip: Store sensitive content in an encrypted notebook. The master password is required to unlock and view the content
encryptedNotebookDisableTip: There are currently ${x} encrypted notebook(s). Disabling is only supported when no encrypted notebooks exist
encryptedNotebookRiskTip: Content cannot be recovered if the master password is lost; when an encrypted notebook is unlocked, AI agents, plugins, MCP tools, and APIs can read its content, same as any other notebook.
notificationsMsgPushTip: Configure which messages are pushed here; once turned off, the message will no longer be displayed
msgWorkspaceNotSSD: Workspace is not on a solid-state drive
embeddingNotEnabledTip: Enable and configure the embedding model above to view indexing progress
rebuildEmbeddingIndexTip: Clear and recalculate embedding vectors for all blocks
rebuildEmbeddingIndexConfirmTip: Are you sure to clear and regenerate all embedding vectors? This may take a long time.
safeModeTip: 🛡️ Safe mode is enabled (code snippets, plugins, custom theme and custom icon are disabled)
gutterTipBacklink:
Click or ⌘/ Open Menu
Drag ${x} Move position
⌘Click⌥→ Open
testConnectionFailModelNotFound: This model is not in the available model list
secretsTip: Provided for Skill and MCP to reference via $NAME, ${NAME} or {{secrets.NAME}}; plugins can use them via API. Secret values do not enter AI conversations and are stored encrypted
variablesTip: Provided for Skill and MCP to reference via $NAME, ${NAME} or {{vars.NAME}}; also usable in chats and skill content. Plugins can use them via API. Variable values enter AI conversations and are stored as plain text
secretNameTip: Name used to reference this secret, use {{secrets.NAME}} in Skill and plugins
variableNameTip: Name used to reference this variable, use {{vars.NAME}} in Skill and plugins
secretNameDuplicate: A secret with this name already exists
variableNameDuplicate: A variable with this name already exists
kernelFault4: Reverse proxy does not forward WebSocket
kernelFault5: If you access SiYuan through a reverse proxy such as NGINX, you must configure the protocol upgrade headers for /ws separately, otherwise the WebSocket handshake will fail.
kernelFault7: Please make sure the container or service is still running, and restart it if needed. You can export the full logs in [Settings - App - System log].
kernelFault8: Please restart SiYuan. You can export the full logs in [Settings - App - System log].
kernelFault10: Some security software may mistakenly block SiYuan. Please add the SiYuan installation path to the trust list (whitelist) of your antivirus and firewall, then retry.
agentNoModelTip: Please configure a provider and model in [Settings - Artificial Intelligence - API Provider] first, then chat with the agent.
dragTip2DocChild: Convert to document as sub-doc of ${x}
dragTip2DocBefore: Convert to document and move above ${x}
dragTip2DocAfter: Convert to document and move below ${x}
aiProviderDisplayNameTip: Name shown in the provider list; leave empty to use the API URL
aiModelDisplayNameTip: Name shown in the model list; leave empty to use the model name
aiEditingModelPickerTip: Select the model for block menu and slash menu AI actions in the editor
aiAgentModelPickerTip: Select the model used by the agent
aiMcpServersTip: Configure Model Context Protocol external tool services for the AI Agent
aiMcpServerNameTip: Must be unique among MCP servers
aiMcpCommandTip: Executable, e.g. npx, node, python, uvx
aiMcpHeadersInvalid: Invalid HTTP headers format; please enter a JSON object
aiMcpServerNameRequired: Please enter an MCP server name
aiMcpServerNameDuplicate: MCP server name already exists; please use a different name
undoCrossDocConfirm: This undo will affect the following documents. Continue?
agentChatBusy: This session is busy in another instance
featurePreview: 💡 This feature is in early preview, still unstable. Please back up your data before use
agentWelcomeGreeting: Hey, what do you have in mind? I've got you covered
agentExample3: Find notes related to the project
agentConfirmAlwaysDesc: Don't ask again for any operations in this session
agentMaxRetriesTip: Max API retry attempts on failure
agentMaxToolCallRoundsTip: Maximum tool call rounds per session, 0 means no limit
agentInputPlaceholder: Type a message, /skill, Enter to send...
noSplitScreenWhenOpenTab: Don't split the screen when opening tabs
noSplitScreenWhenOpenTabTip: Don't automatically split the screen when opening search, PDF and other tabs
useChrome: Only supported in the Chrome browser, using other browsers may encounter compatibility issues that cannot be resolved
includeSubDocsTip: When enabled, all sub-documents of the current document will be included during export
includeRelatedDocsTip: When enabled, documents referenced or bound by databases in the current document will be included during export
removeAssetsID: Remove ID from asset file names
removeAssetsIDTip: When enabled, the ID part will be removed from asset file names when exporting Markdown
clearTempFilesTip: Clear temporary files generated while the app is running to free up storage space
uploadFileTooLarge: ⚠️ The uploaded file [${x}] is too large [${y}]. Are you sure you want to continue uploading?
recentDocsMaxListCount: Maximum number of recent documents listed
recentDocsMaxListCountTip: Maximum number of documents listed in the Recent Documents dialog
bazaarNeedVersion: Requires upgrading SiYuan to v${x} or later to use
statusBarMsgPushTip: Status bar messages let you instantly know the system's running status, and if they bother you you can turn them off
useBackground: Fill column background with option color
clipboardPermissionDenied: Clipboard permission denied. Please allow clipboard access in the browser address bar and try again. Note: the http protocol may not be able to access the clipboard, please use Ctrl+V / ⌘V to paste
reloadUITip: Disabling plugins, disabling JS snippets, or switching themes may require refreshing the UI to take full effect
vacuumDataIndexTip: Check data index, free up storage, and improve index performance
rebuildDataIndexTip: Fully rebuild the data index, which may take some time. Please wait
reconnectPrompt: After switching applications, it will take some time to restore the SiYuan kernel operation. Please wait a few seconds or click the "Retry" button
relativeFontSize: relative to the editor font size
mobileNotSupport: This feature is currently not supported on mobile devices (phone or tablet)
syncIntervalTip: Automatically sync data after it stops changing
newRowInRelation: Create a new entry in ${x} ${y}
dynamicIconDateEmptyInfo: Clear the date, the calendar icon will dynamically display today’s date
backlinkContainChildrenTip: When enabled, child blocks will be included in the backlink calculation
confirmRemoveRelationField: Are you sure you want to delete the ${x} field? After deleting this field, the bidirectional relation field ${z} in the ${y} database will also be deleted synchronously.
removeButKeepRelationField: Remove only this field, keep bidirectional relation field
exportPDFLowMemory: Insufficient available memory to export this PDF, please reduce the content or increase available memory and try exporting again
exportConfTip: Account, lock screen password, synchronization, API token and data repo key will not be exported
importConfTip: After importing, the current settings will be overwritten and the application will be automatically closed, please restart manually
publishServiceTip: When enabled, the publish service will be started. This service publishes the content of the current workspace in read-only mode on the local network. Please ensure the workspace does not contain sensitive information.
publishServicePortTip: Enable the publish service using the specified port number. If set to 0, a random port will be used.
publishServiceAddressesTip: Possible network addresses to access the publish service.
publishServiceAuthTip: When enabled, authentication is required to access the publish service.
publishServiceAuthAccountsTip: List of Basic authentication accounts. Visitors need to enter the username and password from this list to view the published content.
publishAccessProtectedComment: Publicly visible, requires password to access
publishAccessHiddenComment: Not publicly visible, can be accessed directly
publishAccessPrivateComment: Not publicly visible, requires password to access
isMsStoreVerTip: The currently used version is the Microsoft Store version, please check for updates in the Microsoft Store
andSubFile: Are you sure you want to delete ${x} and its ${y} subdocs?
rollbackTip: After deletion, it can be restored in [Data History], retained ${x} days according to [Settings - Documents - History Retention Days]
allowHTMLBLockScript: Allow execution of scripts in HTML content
allowHTMLBLockScriptTip: When enabled, code in HTML blocks and database template fields will not be sanitized. Please be aware of the potential risk of XSS attacks
allowSVGScript: Allow execution of scripts inside SVG
allowSVGScriptTip: When enabled, code inside SVG will not be security-filtered. Be aware of potential XSS risks
autoLaunchMode2: Auto launch and minimize the main interface after booting
editorMarkdownInlineMarkTip: When enabled, the ==foo== inline mark syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineStrikethroughTip: When enabled, the ~~foo~~ inline strikethrough syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineSupTip: When enabled, the ^foo^ inline superscript syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineSubTip: When enabled, the ~foo~ inline subscript syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineTagTip: When enabled, the #foo# inline tag syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineMathTip: When enabled, the $foo$ inline formula syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineAsteriskTip: When enabled, the *foo* italic syntax and the **foo** bold syntax input will be supported
editorMarkdownInlineUnderscoreTip: When enabled, the _foo_ italic syntax and the __foo__ bold syntax input will be supported
containerBlockTip1: Enabling container blocks will result in duplicate search results
dndFolderTip: Please note that ${x} only inserts the file:// hyperlink and does not copy the file
removeCol: Are you sure you want to delete the ${x} field in the database?
confirmUpdateAll: Are you sure you want to update all?
confirmUpdate: Are you sure you want to update?
showCardDay: After how many days do you want to show the card?
noSupportTip: This function does not support the use of card decks
insertPhoto: Take a photo and insert it
listItemDotNumberClickFocus: List item dot/number click to focus
listItemDotNumberClickFocusTip: When enabled, clicking the list item dot/number will focus on the list item
reviewModeTip: Select the order in which new and old cards appear during review
cloudStoragePurgeConfirm:
Purging the cloud storage will completely delete all unreferenced snapshots and related data objects.
  • Please ensure that other devices have paused sync before execution
  • The purge operation is very time-consuming, please ensure that the network is stable
Are you sure to execute it now?
selectRelation: Please select the related field first
snippetsTip: The code snippet has been updated, do you want to save it?
mirrorTip: Mirror database, all data updates will be synchronized to all other mirrors
accountSupport1: Since its first public release on August 31, 2020, SiYuan has been released more than 880 times, solved user requirements and feedback more than 16000 times, and committed code more than 22000 times. We couldn't have achieved this without your support and feedback.
accountSupport2: Your support and feedback will make SiYuan better. We will always be friends with users, work hard to make products better, and provide you with a better knowledge management experience. Thank you very much for your support!
removeWorkspacePhysically: The workspace has been removed from the list, and the data in this workspace ${x} will be permanently deleted. This deletion cannot be undone, do you want to continue?
searchRemoveName: Do you want to delete ${x} and assign its query condition to ${y}?
searchOverwrite: The query name is duplicated, do you want to overwrite it?
inboxTip: Open the user guide to search the inbox to view the instructions
needLogin: This function needs to be logged in to use
createWorkspaceTip: Are you sure to use this path to create a workspace?
commandEmpty: No command yet, click to go to the marketplace to install plugins
syncPerceptionTip: When enabled, it will automatically receive and send data sync signals, so that data sync can be performed for all online devices as much as possible in real time
incompatiblePluginTip: This plugin is not supported on the current terminal
bazaarTrust: The marketplace package is similar to a third-party application, it can do whatever it wants, so installing a marketplace package in the marketplace has certain security risks.
bazaarTrust3: We attach great importance to potential security issues. In order to avoid security risks as much as possible, the following measures have been taken:
bazaarTrustCodeReviewTip: Before the marketplace package is put on the shelves, we will review its code
bazaarTrustOpenSourceTip: The code of most marketplace packages is open source, you can review the code and pay attention to the repository issues before installing
bazaarPeerReviewTip: Numerous community developers can review the marketplace package code
bazaarUserReportTip: If you find malicious code or security issues in the marketplace package, please give us feedback
bazaarTrust1: Once you choose to trust the marketplace, it cannot be closed. If you have installed a marketplace package containing malicious code, please manually delete it on the file system
bazaarTrust2: Disclaimer: For details, please refer to the relevant terms in the open source license AGPLv3 used by SiYuan
enablePluginTip: Do you need to enable this plugin now? You can enable, disable or uninstall it later in [Downloaded - Plugin]
enablePluginTip2: All plugins are currently disabled, please enable them in [Downloaded - Plugin]
confirmPassword: I have already remembered the password
passwordNoMatch: The passwords entered twice do not match
cloudConfigTip: Please configure in [Settings - Account & Sync - Cloud storage service provider]
confirmUninstall:
Are you sure you want to uninstall ${name}?
Uninstalling may remove all related settings and data; please proceed with caution!
scrollGetMore: Scroll up and down to load more
attrBookmarkTip: Associate this block with a bookmark for subsequent viewing through the bookmark panel
attrNameTip: Set a name for this block, mainly for reference and search, a block can only have one unique name
attrAliasTip: Set aliases for this block, a block can set multiple aliases separated by commas
attrMemoTip: Set a memo for this block, only plain text is supported
onlySearchForDocTip: When enabled, [[ or 【【 to search for block references only in doc names
pasteURLAutoConvertTip: When enabled, pasting a URL starting with http:// or https:// will automatically convert it to a clickable link
continueReview2: There are still ${count} cards to review, continue?
returnDesktop: Press back again to desktop. Use [Exit Application] in the right sidebar panel to normally exit the application
enterNewTip: No documents found, Enter to create a new document.
searchTip3: to switch to the next hit
showRecentUpdatedBlocks: The most recently updated blocks will be shown when the input is empty
flashcardNewCardLimitTip: If there are many new cards, you can set the number of new cards to review through this item
flashcardReviewCardLimitTip: If there are many old cards, you can set the number of old cards to review through this item
flashcardMarkTip: When enabled, the mark is recognized as fill in the blank
flashcardListTip: When enabled, the first list item of a list is recognized as a question, and the rest of the list items are recognized as answers
flashcardSuperBlockTip: When enabled, the first child block of a super block is recognized as a question, and the rest of the child blocks are recognized as answers
flashcardHeadingTip: When enabled, the heading block is recognized as a question, and the blocks below are recognized as answers
flashcardDeckTip: When enabled, the card deck classification is supported. This is a historical compatibility option, it is not recommended to enable it unless necessary, and it is recommended to use Quick make card
flashcardFSRSParamRequestRetentionTip: Represents the probability of recall you want to target. Note that there is a tradeoff between higher retention and higher number of repetitions. It is recommended that you set this value somewhere between 0.8 and 0.9
flashcardFSRSParamMaximumIntervalTip: The maximum number of days between repetitions
flashcardFSRSParamWeightsTip: Algorithm weight parameters. The default value is obtained from a smaller sample. If adjustments are needed, please use the FSRS optimizer to calculate
apiKeyTip: It is recommended to assign an API Key to SiYuan separately for management
apiTimeoutTip: The timeout period for initiating a request
apiProxyTip: The network proxy that initiates the request, such as socks://user:pass@127.0.0.1:1080
apiModelTip: The model parameter passed when requesting the API, used to specify the model to use
apiDimensionsTip: The dimensions parameter passed when requesting the API, used to specify the output vector dimensions. Only supported by text-embedding-3 and later models, set to 0 to use the model default
apiMaxTokensTip: The max_completion_tokens parameter passed when requesting the API, used to limit the maximum tokens per response. Set to 0 for no limit
apiTemperatureTip: The temperature parameter passed when requesting the API, used to control the randomness of the generated text (0~2, higher = more random)
apiMaxContextsTip: The maximum number of contexts passed in when requesting the API
apiBaseURLTip: The base URL for API requests, For example, , https://api.openai.com/v1. The actual endpoint is /chat/completions under this address
apiBaseURLEmbeddingTip: The base URL for API requests, For example, https://api.openai.com/v1. The actual endpoint is /embeddings under this address
apiUserAgentTip: The user agent that initiated the request, that is, the HTTP header User-Agent
apiVersionTip: Only required when using the Azure OpenAI service
apiProviderTip: Manage AI model providers and their models. Providers compatible with the Chat Completions API (e.g., DeepSeek, Kimi, MiniMax) are all supported
pdfIsLoading: PDF is loading, please try again later
allAttrs: All attribute names and attribute values
uploadData2CloudTip: Generate a data snapshot and then upload it to the cloud
downloadDataFromCloudTip: Download the latest cloud data snapshot and merge it into local data
transferBlockRefTip: Transfer all references from this block to the target block
share2LiandiConfirmTip:
Are you sure you want to publish this document to the community?
Once published, everyone will be able to view this document, please ensure it does not contain sensitive information
noDueCard: Great job! There are no more review tasks at the moment, check back later!
autoLaunchTip: When enabled, the application will be automatically launched after logging into the operating system
useCriterion: The next query will no longer use the current query criteria
semanticSearchTip: Configure and enable the embedding model to use semantic search in full-text search (experimental feature, may be slow and costly)
proFeature: This feature requires payment (subscribing members do not need to pay separately), one-time payment can be used for lifetime
syncOfficialProviderIntro: Currently selected is the cloud storage service officially provided by SiYuan, which only supports paid subscription users
syncThirdPartyProviderS3Intro: The current selected is a third-party cloud storage service compatible with the Amazon S3 protocol (eg Qiniu, Aliyun OSS, Cloudflare R2)
syncThirdPartyProviderWebDAVIntro: The currently selected is a third-party cloud storage service with the WebDAV protocol. Due to the poor performance and insufficient stability of this protocol, it is recommended to choose the S3 service first
syncThirdPartyProviderLocalIntro: The storage service provided by the local file system is currently selected. Please enter the full path of the local folder in the Endpoint field
syncThirdPartyProviderTip:
Before using this feature, please pay attention to the technical limitations and billing items of the third-party cloud storage service:
  • Technical limitations such as interface calling frequency and bandwidth
  • Billing items such as storage space and traffic
  • Terms of use and availability guarantee
Disclaimer: For details, please refer to the relevant terms in the open source license AGPLv3 used by SiYuan
syncProviderTip: If selected, the cloud storage service of this provider will be used to achieve cloud synchronization and backup functions
confirmReset: Are you sure want to reset all keyboard shortcuts to default settings?
notBatchRemove: Notebook batch deletion is not supported
confirmRemoveAll: Are you sure you want to delete the selected ${count} documents and their subdocuments?
microphoneDenied: Need to allow Siyuan to access the microphone in System Preferences
microphoneNotAccess: Access to the microphone is denied, go to System Preferences to reset
dynamicLoadBlocksTip: This value contains the number of subblocks. If there are many code blocks, formula blocks or chart blocks that need to be rendered, it is recommended not to set too large
backmentionExpandTip: If configured as 0, it will not be expanded, if configured as -1, the panel will be closed
floatWindowModeTip: Choose how to trigger the floating window when the mouse hovers over the block icon, breadcrumb icon, etc.
floatWindowDelayTip: Only takes effect when the floating window trigger method is Hover
codeSnippetTip: Fine-tune the interface or functionality through code snippets
embedBlockBreadcrumbTip: When enabled, embed blocks will display breadcrumbs
editReadonlyTip: When enabled, the document editor will be read-only by default. You can still search and replace text, modify content via API
generateConflictDoc: Generate conflict documentation when syncing conflicts
generateConflictDocTip: When enabled, a conflict document will be generated when a synchronization conflict occurs, so that it can be opened and viewed directly. Whether enabled or not, the [Data History] will record the conflict document
autoDownloadUpdatePkgTip: When enabled, it will automatically check the version update every two hours. If there is an updated version, it will automatically download the installation package and prompt for installation
htmlBlockError: The execution of the following script will affect the interface display, and the script has stopped running
htmlBlockTip: Multiple HTML blocks are formed. To prevent data loss, please use <div> tags to wrap and remove blank lines
katexMacrosTip: Please use JSON object format ({}) to wrap macro definitions, eg { "\\foo": "{x^2}" }
systemLogTip: Program running records are saved in the system log. By exporting the system log and sending it to developers, it can better help developers diagnose program problems
syncConfGuide2:
This key is used for data sync end-to-end encryption
The key is generated based on the password you enter, please remember the password
syncConfGuide3: The cloud sync directory is used to store the encrypted data corresponding to the current workspace. The default name is main. If you only have one workspace to sync, use main directly
syncConfGuide5:
If the amount of data is large, the first sync will be slow, please wait patiently
Do not switch apps and keep the screen bright while the iOS/iPad is syncing
jumpToParentNext: Jump to the next block of the parent block
jumpToParentPrev: Jump to the previous block of the parent block
initRepoKeyTip: If the key has been initialized on other devices, please use [Import Key] or generate the key with the same passphrase, otherwise the data cannot be synced to the cloud, so be sure to use the same key on all devices
crossKeepLazyLoad: Cross-page multi-selection needs to select [Keep Loaded Content] in the more menu
cloudBackupTip: Please go to [Data History - Data Snapshot] to operate
fullWidthTip: When enabled, the editing area will be displayed as wide as possible
tabLimit1: Sort by opening time, close the earliest opened tab
resetRepoTip: Resetting the data repository will completely delete the key and all snapshots, are you sure you want to reset?
keyPlaceholder: Please paste the key string here
dataRepoKeyTip1: The data repo is used to encrypt and save data snapshots. Snapshots can be created and rolled back in the [Data History]
dataRepoKeyTip2: All devices must use the same key, if the keys are inconsistent, the data cannot be synced to the cloud
dataRepoPurgeTip: Delete all unreferenced snapshots and related data objects
dataRepoPurgeConfirm: Purging the data repo will completely delete all unreferenced snapshots and related data objects, are you sure to purge?
activationCodePlaceholder: Subscription activation code from a specific channel. Not required for purchases from the official website; account permissions are activated automatically
exportDataTip: Package and export all files in the workspace/data/ folder as a zip archive
importDataTip: Import the exported zip archive, overwriting the workspace/data/ folder by path
showHeadingWithBlocks: Show heading block with blocks below
showHeadingOnlyBlocks: Show only blocks below heading block
headingEmbedModeTip: Set the display style of heading blocks in embed blocks
rtlTip: Render content from right to left
deactivateUserTip:
• Once the account is deactivated, it cannot be recovered, please do not try it at will
  • The username will be filled with someone101 (the following The number is the user number), the password will be reset by a random number
  • Clear the user's nickname, self-label, URL, profile, avatar, site link, mailing address and other information
  • All privacy setting switches will be restored to the default public state
  • Unbound third-party social accounts, mobile phones
  • Username, mobile phone number, bound third-party The account will not be able to be used again in the future
  • User status is set to disabled, login prohibited
searchBlockType: Block types (searches in the enabled types below, the filter option in the global search overrides this setting)
searchBlockAttr: Block attributes (search not only in the content, but also in the following enabled attributes)
searchBackmention: Backlink mentions (backlink mentions search keywords are obtained from)
searchVirtualRef: Virtual reference (virtual reference search keywords are obtained from)
netImg2LocalAsset: Convert network images to local images
reminderTip: The reminder time cannot be less than the current time
wechatTip: The content block will be sent to the cloud in clear text, and pushed through the WeChat MP template message when it expires
notEmpty: The reminder time cannot be empty
experimentalFeature: (⚗️ This feature is in the experimental stage)
bootSyncFailed: Failed to synchronize data at startup
uninstallTip: Currently in use, please switch it in [Settings - Appearance] before uninstalling
author: Author
subject: Subject
creator: Creator
loadingError: An error occurred while loading the PDF.
printingNotSupported: Warning: Printing is not fully supported by this browser.
printingNotReady: Warning: The PDF is not fully loaded for printing.
find_reached_top: Reached top of document, continued from bottom
find_reached_bottom: Reached end of document, continued from top
password_label: Enter the password to open this PDF file.
rebuildIndexTip: A system runtime error was found, please choose whether to exit or rebuild the index for repair
customEmojiTip: Place images in the emojis folder, you can use one folder for classification, the path must not contain spaces or Markdown markers
cloudIntro2: The encryption and decryption process is completely performed on the local device
cloudIntro3: The encryption algorithm is the industry-recognized safe AES GCM
cloudIntro4: The password set by the user is encrypted with the built-in key of the program and stored locally
cloudIntro5: Unless you know the password or brute force, it cannot be decrypted
cloudIntro6: Unlimited number of devices and number of workspaces
cloudIntro7: Different local workspaces correspond to different data synchronization directories in the cloud
cloudIntro8: Different devices keep their own data history, and data that is overwritten or deleted by synchronization will not be lost
cloudIntro10: Upload local asset files to the cloud with one click
cloudIntro11: One-click to copy the document to the Wechat MP, Zhihu, Yuque etc. platforms
reposTip: The name of the cloud synchronization directory corresponding to the current workspace, you can select it on other devices after it is created on the first device
setEmojiTip: Please configure in [Settings - Appearance - Add custom emoji]
openSyncTip2: When changing from disabled to enabled, it is recommended to manually click the sync button to trigger a synchronization
syncModeTip: The sync mode can be further selected after cloud sync is enabled
syncMode2: Manual (automatic auto only once when the software is started and closed, other times need to manually trigger)
syncMode3: Full manual sync (no sync on startup and shutdown, full manual control of sync timing and sync direction)
cloudSyncDirTip: Each cloud sync directory only stores data for one workspace, and one local workspace can only use one cloud sync directory. Please do not switch back and forth. After changing the data repo key, you need to switch to a new cloud sync directory
emptyCloudSyncList: The cloud sync list is empty
dockTip: Click Open/Minimize Right Click/Drag Adjust position
attrValue1: Leave the attribute value blank will automatically delete the attribute
uploadAssets2CDNConfirmTip: Are you sure to upload the assets in this document to the cloud?
notSupport1: Does not support drag and drop across notebooks
keymapTip: After some shortcut keys are modified, you need to click the refresh button to take effect
searchLimit: The number of search results displayed
searchLimit1: If the amount of data is large, do not configure the value too large, the default is 64
searchLimit2: This configuration item affects all functions related to searches, such as block ref search, file history, query embed block, tab panel, and template function queryBlocks/querySpans
searchCaseSensitive1: When enabled, all search-related functions will be case sensitive
searchHanSensitive1: When enabled, all search-related functions will distinguish between Simplified and Traditional Chinese characters
gutterTip:
Click or ⌘/ Open Menu
Drag ${x} Move position
accountDisplayVIP: Show paid indicator in top bar
rollbackConfirm: The rollback operation cannot be undone, please proceed with caution. Are you sure you want to roll back ${name} to ${time}?

pdfConfirm: Do you want to continue exporting with the selected Light theme?
exportTplTip: The data already exists, do you need to overwrite it?
name: Name
checkToggle: Check the task list to switch
searchSubTypeListTip: List subtypes (Ordered/Unordered/Task) also apply to list items
kernelFault1: The connection to the kernel has been lost, but your data should be safe. SiYuan will automatically try to reconnect every 3 seconds, and this window will close by itself once the kernel recovers.
kernelFault2: If the problem persists, please look for help or report bugs here
fontSizeTip: The default font size is 16, this setting affects the editor and exported PDF/HTML font size display
fontSizeScrollZoomTip: When enabled, press and hold Ctrl to quickly adjust the font size through the mouse wheel or trackpad pinch-zoom gesture
font1: This setting only affects the font family display in the editor, choose Default to use the theme's font family
newNameFile: The name of the new subdocument is
newNameSettingFile: The name of the new document is
newContentFile: The content of the new document is
refExpired: Search content block does not exist
generateHistory: History Generation Interval (minutes, set to 0 to disable)
generateHistoryInterval: History is automatically generated when editing or deleting, which can be viewed and rolled back in the [Data History]
confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to completely delete all historical data in the workspace?
clearAll: Are you sure to clean up all unreferenced assets?
waitSync: The editing data has not been synchronized to the cloud
insertRight: Open to the Right of the Tab
account2: End-to-end encrypted data sync and backup
account11: Until the end of the early bird discount
accountTip: I have read and agree SiYuan Privacy Policy
appearance6: The window layout will be restored to the initial state after reset
appearance5: Select the mode of the user interface
appearance3: Select the syntax highlighting theme used in dark mode
appearance2: Select the syntax highlighting theme used in light mode
appearance12: Choose what happens when you click the window close button
appearance17: When enabled, the status bar will be hidden
appearance18: Configure the status bar message switch
appearance20: When enabled, the tab bar merges with the top bar into a single row for more editing space
md3: When enabled, the code block will display the ligature
md4: When enabled, automatically indent the beginning of paragraphs to conform to traditional Chinese typesetting habits
md8: When enabled, if the image is a web file (non-local asset file), it will display a corner mark
md16: Display bookmarks, names, aliases, notes, the name of the bound database, and reference count in the top right corner
md28: When enabled, the code block will display the line number (Please note that enabling may reduce editor performance)
md30: Replaces with spaces only when Tab is pressed, does not replace tabs (Tab) in clipboard with spaces
md32: When enabled, content that exceeds the code block width will wrap automatically
md34: When enabled, it will automatically identify the possible reference relationship according to the name, alias and anchor text of the existing block ref
md36: Use the English comma , or line break to separate, the comma itself can be escaped by \,
md37: The maximum length of block ref dynamic anchor text
md38: The maximum length of the anchor text that is automatically rendered when the block ref anchor text is not customized, the default is 96 characters
md41: Use the English comma , or line break to separate, the comma itself can be escaped by \,. Support using / to wrap regular expressions, for example foo,/[0-9]+/ means to exclude foo and numbers
fileTree2: The Documents panel will automatically select the current document when the editor tab is switched
fileTree3: No confirmation required when deleting a single document
fileTree4: When enabled, no confirmation dialog appears when deleting a single document
fileTree5: Default save path for block reference documents
fileTree6: For example, /folder1/{{now | date "20060102150405"}}/, starting with / uses the selected notebook's root path, not starting with / uses the current document's relative path
fileTree8: The newly opened document tab will replace the unmodified tab
fileTree10: When enabled, the unpinned tabs that were opened the last time will be automatically closed every time the interface is started
fileTree12: Default save path for new documents
fileTree13: For example, /folder1/{{now | date "20060102150405"}}, starting with / uses the selected notebook's root path, not starting with / uses the current document's relative path
fileTree14: Save path (support date format template variables, such as /Daily Notes/{{now | date "2006/01"}}/{{now | date "2006-01-02"}})
fileTree15: Template path (for example, dailynote.md, the file needs to be placed under the workspace/data/templates/)
fileTree17: If there are too many sub-docs/tags, this restriction can be used to improve performance
fileTree18: Allows creation of sub-documents deeper than 7 levels
fileTree19: Some operating systems have technical limitations that may prevent manual copying of workspace data after creating sub-documents greater than 7 levels
fileTree21: When enabled, the single-line JSON format will be used when saving .sy docs and database .json files, which can reduce the file size by about 30% and improve read and write efficiency by 50%
fileTree23: Notify when .sy files or database .json exceed this size
fileTree24: Place new subdocuments at the top
fileTree25: When enabled, newly created subdocuments will be placed at the top of the subdocument list (only takes effect when custom sorting is enabled)
fileTree27: For example, /shorthands/{{now | date "20060102150405"}}, if no template variable is used the shorthand will be appended to the end of the document at the specified path
export10: For example <span style="color: #fff;background-color: black;padding: 4px;border-radius: 5px;float:right;">SiYuan</span>, if empty, use watermark text or watermark file path.
export11: Content handling method of content ref block when exporting
export12: Content handling method of content embed block when exporting
export14: Please fill in the symbol on the left side of the anchor text and the symbol on the right side of the anchor text in the input box in turn
export16: Please fill in the symbol on the left side of the tag and the symbol on the right side of the tag in the input box in turn
export18: When enabled, insert the document title as a heading 1 at the beginning
export20: Exporting Word .docx files requires format conversion using Pandoc
export22: %page is the current page number, %pages is the total page number, and supports Sprig template functions
export24: When enabled, add some general metadata information at the beginning of the exported Markdown file
export26: Pandoc parameters used when exporting Word .docx files, for example the --reference-doc parameter
export28: Watermark text or watermark file path
export29: Watermark position, size and style, etc.
export32: When enabled, inline memos will be exported as superscript
theme2: Select the icons used in the user interface
language1: Select the display language of the user interface
export6: About the handling of anchor text in PDF annotations when exporting
export7: File Name - Page Number - Anchor Text
paragraphBeginningSpace: Two empty spaces at the beginning of the paragraph
confirmDeleteCloudDir: Are you sure you want to delete the cloud sync directory
fileNameRule: The title cannot contain the / character, it has been automatically replaced with the full-width ／ character
about1: Copyright (c) 2020-present • Yunnan Liandi Technology Co., Ltd. • Privacy Policy • User Agreement
about3: Please use the Chrome browser and stay on the same network as the computer, port ${port} (the first started workspace, in addition to the random port, will also automatically listen on 6806 as a fixed port to facilitate the browser clipping extension or other external programs calling the kernel interface), possible reachable random port network addresses:
about6: After configuration, it will be used as the lock screen password, leave it blank to disable
about8: When enabled, the application will be automatically locked when locking the system screen
about12: When enabled, allows other devices on the same local network to access. After modification the application will automatically close, please restart manually
networkServeTLSTip: When enabled, network connections will use an automatically generated self-signed certificate for TLS encryption. The browser will show a security warning that must be accepted manually. After modification the application will automatically close, please restart manually
networkServeTLSTip2: HTTPS only works on the fixed port 6806, random ports do not support HTTPS
exportCACertTip: Export the CA certificate（ca.crt）file. Install this certificate on client devices to trust the self‑signed HTTPS connection
exportCABundleTip: Export the CA certificate and private key for sharing with other SiYuan devices. Devices using the same CA will trust certificates issued by it
importCABundleTip: Import the CA bundle from another SiYuan device. After import this device will use the same CA, allowing clients to trust certificates from all such devices
importCABundleSuccess: CA bundle imported successfully, please restart the app to apply changes
about14:
The token needs to be authenticated when calling the API
HTTP request header Authorization: token ${token}
about17: Do not enable proxy when set to Direct connection
about18: When using a non-loopback address (127.0.0.1/[::1]) please set the lock screen password first
desktopModeTip: Use desktop interface layout when enabled
mobileModeTip: Use mobile interface layout when disabled
downloadTip: The browser does not support the download function
outlineOutdentTip: When enabled, the outdent will be using the list outline logic, i.e. moving the list items below the parent
spellcheckTip: When enabled, the browser's built-in spellcheck will be used. Please select the languages to check in your browser settings
spellcheckTip2: When enabled, the built-in spellcheck will be used and the language list will be shown below. Please select the languages to check from the list
pasteToWechatMP: Copied, ready to paste to Wechat MP
pasteToZhihu: Copied, ready to paste to Zhihu
pasteToYuque: Copied, ready to paste to Yuque
record-tip: The device does not support recording
title: Title
